title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what people might enjoy about preparing food in these ways and what is important to each person.

images.label: A
images.description: A professional chef carefully preparing fresh ingredients in a restaurant kitchen.

images.label: B
images.description: A family cooking together in a home kitchen, with children helping to stir and mix.

followUp.question: Which approach to food preparation do you think is most important to encourage in modern life? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say what makes these eating experiences special and how the people might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: People eating street food from small stalls at a lively, bustling outdoor night market.

images.label: E
images.description: A couple having a romantic dinner at an elegantly decorated, dimly lit restaurant.

followUp.question: Which type of eating experience do you find the most enjoyable? (Why?)
